description: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Perplexity 등 2026년 필수 AI 도구를 카테고리별로 비교 정리

resources.title: Claude 공식 사이트
resources.description: Anthropic의 Claude — 긴 문서 분석, 코딩, 창작에 강한 AI

resources.title: Google Gemini 공식 사이트

resources.title: Perplexity AI — AI 검색 엔진
resources.description: 실시간 웹 검색 기반 AI 답변, 출처 링크 포함

resources.title: Cursor AI 코드 에디터
resources.description: AI가 내장된 VS Code 기반 코드 에디터

resources.title: 2026 AI 도구 총정리 — 뭘 써야 할까?
resources.search_keyword: 2026 AI 도구 비교 ChatGPT Claude Gemini 뭐가 좋을까

resources.title: AI 도구별 특징과 용도 완벽 정리
resources.search_keyword: AI 도구 종류 특징 용도 비교 2026 한국어

resources.title: Best AI Tools 2026 Comparison
resources.search_keyword: best AI tools comparison 2026 Claude ChatGPT Gemini

resources.title: 같은 질문을 3개 AI에 던져보기
resources.description: 동일한 복잡한 질문을 ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini에 각각 입력하고 답변 품질·스타일 차이 비교
resources.command: 동일 프롬프트를 chat.openai.com, claude.ai, gemini.google.com에 각각 입력 후 결과 비교

resources.title: Perplexity로 실시간 정보 검색하기
resources.description: Perplexity.ai에서 최신 뉴스나 정보가 필요한 질문을 하고 출처 링크와 함께 답변 받기
resources.command: perplexity.ai → '2026년 AI 시장 최신 트렌드는?' 입력 후 출처 확인

quiz.question: Which AI tool is known for its strong capabilities in document analysis, coding, and creative writing?
quiz.explanation: Claude, developed by Anthropic, is specifically noted for its strengths in analyzing long documents, coding, and creative tasks.

quiz.question: What feature distinguishes Google's Gemini from other AI tools?
options: Focus on news and information retrieval
quiz.explanation: Gemini is characterized by its multimodal capabilities and integration with Google Workspace, setting it apart from other tools.

quiz.question: How does Perplexity.ai provide answers to user queries?
options: Through real-time web search with source links
By editing code within a text editor
By analyzing complex questions across multiple platforms
quiz.explanation: Perplexity.ai is designed to provide answers based on real-time web searches and includes source links for the information provided.

practicePrompts.label: Compare AI Responses
practicePrompts.instruction: Analyze how different AIs respond to the same question.
practicePrompts.prompt: Ask ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini the same complex question and compare their answers.
practicePrompts.followUp: Try asking a simpler question to see how the responses differ.

practicePrompts.label: Use Perplexity.ai
practicePrompts.instruction: Get the latest information using an AI tool.
practicePrompts.prompt: Ask Perplexity.ai about the latest news on AI tools and include the source links in your query.
practicePrompts.followUp: Ask a follow-up question to see how it expands on the topic.

practicePrompts.label: Explore Code Editing
practicePrompts.instruction: Test an AI integrated development environment.
practicePrompts.prompt: Use the AI features in a VS Code-based editor to write a simple function in Python.
practicePrompts.followUp: Modify the function and see how the AI suggests improvements.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.
evaluation.context: This learning topic is "2026 주요 AI 도구 총정리". ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Perplexity 등 2026년 필수 AI 도구를 카테고리별로 비교 정리
successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
